title: Critic verdict
description: Machine-checkable structure for a critic (Opus) review verdict. Emitted as the last fenced ```json block in the critic's final message. Validated by tools/critic_verdict_check.py (rules are hardcoded there; this file is the reference schema, checked for drift by tools/test_critic_verdict_check.py).

verdict.description: fit = ПРИНЯТЬ, fit_with_fixes = ДОРАБОТАТЬ, blocker = ОТКЛОНИТЬ.

blockers.description: Blocking findings. Empty when verdict is fit; non-empty when verdict is blocker.

class_completeness.description: Answer on class completeness of the fix per docs/SIBLING_MAP.md (D-0043).

reruns.description: Control reruns of the mechanical layer (D-0046).

fixes.description: Required and non-empty when verdict is fit_with_fixes; optional otherwise.
